allow: Bash(ls *.db 2>/dev/null && echo "db exists" || echo "no db yet")

Bash(/home/pixl/Dev/AppartClaude/venv/bin/python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('appartclaude.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cols = [row[1] for row in cur.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(listings\)'\)]
print\('columns:', cols\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(/home/pixl/Dev/AppartClaude/venv/bin/python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('appartclaude.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
try:
    cur.execute\('ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN latitude REAL'\)
    cur.execute\('ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN longitude REAL'\)
    conn.commit\(\)
    print\('columns added'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'error: {e}'\)
conn.close\(\)
")
